title.ko: 소화기와 대포 등의 화기에 공통되는 기능적 특징 또는 세부; 소화기 또는 대포용 총포가(mountings)
title.en: FUNCTIONAL FEATURES OR DETAILS COMMON TO BOTH SMALLARMS AND ORDNANCE, e.g. CANNONS; MOUNTINGS FOR SMALLARMS OR ORDNANCE

definition.ko: 추진의 형식 F41A1/00 브리취(총개머리, 포미) 기구 F41A3/00 잠금해제기구 F41A5/00 총의 재장전, 외부에 동력을 구비한 총 F41A7/00 공급 또는 장전, 탄창 F41A9/00 조립 특성, 모듈러개념, 연결식 또는 접철식(ARTICUIATED OR COLLAPSIBLE) 총 F41A11/00 냉각, 가열, 환기, 블로잉 F41A13/00 익스트랙터(EXTRACTORS), 이젝터 F41A15/00 안전장치 F41A17/00 발사 또는 방아쇠 기구, 공이치기(COCKING) F41A19/00 총포신, 총포신 내통, 총포구 취부구 F41A21/00 총포가(GUN MOUNTINGS), 예. 차량에 대한 것 F41A23/00 반동이 있는 것 F41A25/00 승강 또는 선회하는 것 F41A27/00 청소 또는 윤활 F41A29/00 시험 F41A31/00 훈련에 대한 적용 F41A33/00 기타 부속구 또는 세부 F41A35/00 이 서브 클래스의 다른 그룹으로 분류되지 않는 주제 사항 F41A99/00

title.ko: 폭발성 또는 연소성 추진장약의 사용에 특징이 있는 미사일의 추진(폭발성 또는 연소성 추진장약을 사용하지 않는 미사일의 투사 F41B; 로켓 또는 어뢰의 발사 F41F 3/00, 자기 추진(Selfpropluson)
title.en: Missile propulsion characterised by the use of explosive or combustible propellant charges (projecting missiles without use of explosive or combustible propellant charge F41B;launching rockets or torpedoes F41F0003000000;missile self-propulsion F42B0015000000)

Hypervelocity missile propulsion using successive means for increasing the propulsive force, e.g. using successively initiated propellant charges arranged along the barrel length; Multistage missile propulsion
Missile propulsion using the combustion of a liquid or gaseous fuel, e.g. hypergolic fuel

Adjusting the range without varying elevation angle or propellant charge data, e.g. by venting a part of the propulsive charge gases, or by adjusting the capacity of the cartridge or combustion chamber
Recoilless guns, i.e. guns having propulsion means producing no recoil
a counter projectile being used to balance recoil

title.ko: 브리취(총개머리, 포미) 기구, 예. 폐쇄(locks)
title.en: Breech mechanism, e.g. locks

title.ko: 폐쇄식(block action), 예. 주(主)브리취의 개구운동이 총포신 축을 횡단하는 것
title.en: Block action, i.e. the main breech opening movement being transverse to the barrel axis

title.ko: 브리취 블록(breech block)이 선회하는 것
title.en: with pivoting breech-block

title.ko: 블록의 후방에서 총포신 축을 횡단하는 수평축에 관한 것(F41A 3/08이 우선)
title.en: about a horizontal axis transverse to the barrel axis at the rear of the block (F41A0003080000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 회전하는 나사산 형태의 밀폐 플러그를 가진 것(F41A 3/30이 우선)
title.en: carrying a rotably mounted obturating plug of the screw-thread or the interrupted-thread type (F41A0003300000 takes precedence)
with sliding breech-block, e.g. vertically

title.ko: 노리쇠 작동(bolt action), 예. 주브리취 개구운동이 총포신 축에 수평인 것
title.en: Bolt action, i.e. the main breech opening movement being parallel to the barrel axis
Rigid bolt locks, i.e. having locking elements rigidly mounted on the bolt or bolt handle and on the barrel or breech-housing respectively
the locking elements effecting a rotary movement about the barrel axis, e.g. rotating cylinder bolt locks
hand-operated
Straight-pull operated bolt locks, i.e. the operating hand effecting only a straight movement parallel to the barrel axis
the locking being effected by rotating the operating handle or lever transversely to the barrel axis
the locking elements forming part of the operating handle or lever
semi-automatically or automatically operated, e.g. having a slidable bolt-carrier and a rotatable bolt
having fixed locking elements on the non-rotating bolt and rotating locking elements mounted on the barrel or breech housing, e.g. rotatable rings
Interlocking means, e.g. locking lugs, screw threads
the bolt being rocked about a notional axis transverse to the barrel axis
the bolt additionally effecting a sliding movement transverse to the barrel axis

title.ko: 쎄미 레지드 볼트 폐쇄, 예. 노리쇠 또는 총포신 또는 브리취 하우징에 움직일 수 있게 부착된 폐쇄요소를 갖는 것
title.en: Semi-rigid bolt locks, i.e. having locking elements movably mounted on the bolt or on the barrrel or breech housing

title.ko: 동요되는 폐쇄요소를 갖는 것, 예. 레버 또는 베인(Vane)을 회동하는 것
title.en: having rocking locking elements, e.g. pivoting levers or vanes

title.ko: 노리쇠에 부착된 것(F41A 3/42가 우선)
title.en: mounted on the bolt (F41A0003420000 takes precedence)
hand-operated

title.ko: 미끄럼운동하는 폐쇄요소를 갖는 것, 예. 볼 롤러
title.en: having sliding locking elements, e.g. balls, rollers

title.ko: 노리쇠에 부착된 것(F41A 3/48이 우선)
title.en: mounted on the bolt (F41A0003480000 takes precedence)
hand-operated
Toggle-joint locks, e.g. crank-operated
hand-operated
Bolt locks of the unlocked type, i.e. being inertia operated
the bolt being provided with an additional slidable mass
Breakdown breech mechanisms, e.g. for shotguns

title.ko: 둘 또는 그 이상의 총신을 갖는 총포용 브리취 기구(F41A 3/58이 우선; 회전대포용 F41F 1/10)
title.en: Breech mechanisms for guns having two or more barrels (F41A0003580000 takes precedence;for revolving-cannon guns F41F0001100000)
using combustion gas pressure for adding to the mechanical locking action, or for delaying breech opening movement

title.ko: 브리취 폐쇄의 장착(mounting) 브리취 폐쇄 또는 브리취 폐쇄장착을 위한 부속구
title.en: Mounting of breech-blocks; Accessories for breech-blocks or breech-block mountings
Breech housings or frames; Receivers
Bolt stops, i.e. means for limiting bolt opening movement
Anti-rebound arrangements, i.e. preventing rebound of the bolt out of the firing position
Operating handles or levers; Mounting thereof in breech-blocks or bolts
Obturating or packing devices for gas leak prevention in breech mechanisms
specially adapted for sealing the gap between the forward end of the cartridge chamber and the rearward end of the barrel, e.g. sealing devices for revolvers or revolver-type guns

title.ko: 노리쇠 완충장치 또는 복좌기(複座機)
title.en: Bolt buffer or recuperator means
Adjustable spring buffers

title.ko: 코일 스프링 완충장치(3/80이 우선)
title.en: Coil spring buffers (F41A0003800000 takes precedence)
mounted within the gun stock
mounted under the barrel
mounted around the barrel
Fluid buffers
adjustable
in combination with spring buffers

title.ko: 자동으로 폐쇄를 개방시키기 위한 추진 장약 에너지에 의하여 작동되는 기계 또는 시스템
title.en: Mechanisms or systems operated by propellant charge energy for automatically opening the lock
recoil-operated
the barrel being tilted during recoil
the barrel being rotated about its longitudinal axis during recoil
having an accelerator lever acting on the breech-block or bolt during the opening movement
having a movable inertia weight
mounted in a gun having a fixed barrel
Barrel stops, i.e. devices for holding the recoiling barrel in a predetermined position, e.g. the recoil position
having a barrel moving forwardly after the firing of a shot

title.ko: 가스로 작동되는 것
title.en: gas-operated
using a gas piston arranged concentrically around the barrel
having two or more gas pistons
by direct action of gas pressure on bolt or locking elements

title.ko: 총포신으로부터 가스를 유출시키기 위한 장치 또는 시스템(F41A 5/20에서 F41A 5/24까지가 우선)
title.en: Arrangements or systems for bleeding the gas from the barrel (F41A0005200000-F41A0005240000 take precedence)
Adjustable systems
Gas- or recoil-operation, e.g. selection of gas- or recoil-operated systems
Energy accumulator systems, i.e. systems for opening the breech-block by energy accumulated during barrel or gas piston recoil
with spring accumulators
with fluid accumulators

title.ko: 자동발사 전에 브리취 블록 또는 노리쇠 또는 총신을 개시위치에 갖다 놓기 위한 보조기구; 외부에 동력을 구비한 총포의 구동기구; 원격제어형 총포 장전장치 (chargers)
title.en: Auxiliary mechanisms for bringing the breech-block or bolt or the barrel to the starting position before automatic firing (operating handles or levers F41A0003000000); Drives for externally-powered guns (revolving-cannon guns F41F0001000000); Remote-controlled gun chargers
Machine-gun rechargers, e.g. manually operated
fluid operated
electrically operated
Drives for externally-powered guns, i.e. drives for moving the breech-block or bolt by an external force during automatic firing
using a rotating cylindrical drum having a camming groove

title.ko: 탄약의 공급 또는 장전(공기총에 있어서 탄창에서 미사일을 공급 또는 장전하기 위한 적용 F41B 11/02) 탄창; 카트리지 방출용 안내수단(익스트랙터 또는 이젝트 15/00)
title.en: Feeding or loading of ammunition (adaptations for feeding or loading missiles from magazines in air guns F41B0011500000); Magazines; Guiding means for the extracting of cartridges (cartridge extractors or ejectors F41A0015000000)

title.ko: 탄대가 없는 탄약의 공급
title.en: Feeding of unbelted ammunition
using wheel conveyors, e.g. star-wheel-shaped conveyors
using screw or rotary-spiral conveyors
using endless-chain belts carrying a plurality of ammunition
in tandem sequence

title.ko: 주기적으로 움직이는 콘베이어를 사용하는 것, 복귀행정 중에 탄약으로부터 없어지는 또는 분리되는 탄약추출기 또는 이송요소가 있는 콘베이어
title.en: using cyclically moving conveyors, i.e. conveyors having ammunition pusher or carrier elements which are emptied or disengaged from the ammunition during the return stroke
Reciprocating conveyors, i.e. conveyors pushing a plurality of ammunition during the feeding stroke

title.ko: 이동할 수 있는 탄약송탄기 또는 공급트레이, 예. 탄창으로부터의 이송용
title.en: Movable ammunition carriers or loading trays, e.g. for feeding from magazines
pivoting or swinging
in a horizontal plane
mounted within a smallarm
in a vertical plane
transverse to the barrel axis
mounted within a smallarm
parallel to the barrel axis
mounted within a smallarm
feeding from a magazine under the barrel
feeding from a magazine mounted in the stock

title.ko: 미끄럼 운동하는 것, 예. 왕복 운동하는 것
title.en: sliding, e.g. reciprocating

title.ko: 수직방향 내에서(F41A 9/23이 우선)
title.en: in a vertical direction (F41A0009230000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 수평방향 내에서(F41A 9/23이 우선)
title.en: in a horizontal direction (F41A0009230000 takes precedence)
mounted within a smallarm

title.ko: 공급요소로서 이동가능한 탄창 또는 클립을 사용한 것
title.en: using a movable magazine or clip as feeding element
using a sliding clip

title.ko: 회전하는 드럼형 탄창을 사용하는 것
title.en: using a revolving drum magazine

title.ko: 리벌버형 총포에 있어서
title.en: in revolver-type guns

title.ko: 소화기식의 것(리벌버에 있어서의 것 F41C 3/14)
title.en: of smallarm type (in revolvers F41C0003140000)

title.ko: 벨트로 된 탄약의 공급
title.en: Feeding of belted ammunition
Sprocket-type belt transporters
with cartridge stripping means
Reciprocating-slide-type belt transporters
with cartridge stripping means

title.ko: 탄창으로부터(벨트로 된 탄약을 위한 탄창 그 자체는 F41A 9/79 참조)
title.en: from magazines (magazines for belted ammunition per seF41A0009790000)
Feeding multibarrel guns
Feed mechanisms for revolving-cannon guns
Feeding two or more kinds of ammunition to the same gun; Feeding from two sides
Loading arrangements, i.e. for bringing the ammunition into the firing position
Ramming arrangements
the breech-block itself being the rammer
pushing unbelted ammunition from a box magazine on the gun frame into the cartridge chamber
Rammers separate from breech-block
Chain rammers
Fluid-operated piston rammers
the cartridge chamber or the barrel as a whole being tiltable between a loading and a firing position
the cartridge chamber being formed by two complementary elements, movable one relative to the other for loading
using forwardly-sliding barrels or barrel parts for loading
by gravitational force
Internally-powered drives, i.e. operated by propellant charge energy, e.g. couplings, clutches, energy accumulators
External power or control systems
Boosters, i.e. externally-powered motors
Arrangements for changing from automatic or magazine-loading to hand-loading
Charged-condition indicators, i.e. indicating the presence of a cartridge in the cartridge chamber
Cartridge guides, stops or positioners, e.g. for cartridge extraction
Fixed guiding means, mounted on, or near, the cartridge chamber
Movable guiding means
Flexible chutes, e.g. for guiding belted ammunition from the magazine to the gun
Cartridge stops; Cartridge positioners
Ejectors for clips or magazines, e.g. when empty

title.ko: 탄피 또는 탄대수집기 또는 캐처(Catchers)(F41A 9/81이 우선)
title.en: Empty-cartridge-case or belt-link collectors or catchers (F41A0009810000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 탄창
title.en: Magazines

title.ko: 탄창내에 남아있는 카트리지의 수를 나타내는 수단을 가진 것 예. 최종탄 표시기(최종발사안전장치 F41A 17/40)
title.en: having means for indicating the number of cartridges left in the magazine, e.g. last-round indicators (last-round safeties F41A0017400000)
specially adapted for releasable connection with other magazines

title.ko: 벨트로 되지 않은 탄약을 위한 것
title.en: for unbelted ammunition

title.ko: 카트리지 종동부를 가진 상자형 탄창
title.en: Box magazines having a cartridge follower

title.ko: 장전을 위한 장치 즉, 재장전(탄창 재장전을 위한 장치 또는 기구 F41A 9/83)
title.en: Arrangements thereon for charging, i.e. reloading (apparatus or tools for reloading magazines F41A0009830000)
having means for depressing the cartridge follower, or for locking it in a depressed position
Plural magazines, e.g. tandem magazines
characterised by multiple-row or zigzag arrangement of cartridges
Arrangements thereon for discharging, e.g. cartridge followers or discharge throats
Arrangements thereon for varying capacity; Adapters or inserts for changing cartridge size or type
Tubular magazines, i.e. magazines containing the ammunition in lengthwise tandem sequence
Drum magazines
with radially disposed cartridges
having a spiral cartridge channel
Magazines having an endless-chain conveyor
Magazines having a screw conveyor
Magazines having a reciprocating conveyor
for belted ammunition
having provision for quick-coupling of the belts of adjacent magazines
having provision for collecting belt links or empty cartridge cases
Reloading of magazines
Apparatus or tools for reloading magazines with unbelted ammunition, e.g. cartridge clips
Clips
for reloading revolver-type magazines
Feeding belted ammunition into magazines

title.ko: 탄약취급운반차 또는 이송카트(Carts)(F41A 9/86이 우선)
title.en: Ammunition handling dollies or transfer carts (F41A0009860000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 조립 또는 분해 특성; 모듈(modular)개념; 연결식 또는 접철식 총포(F41A 3/64, F41A 19/10에서 F41A 19/15, F41A 21/48, F41A 25/26이 우선)
title.en: Assembly or disassembly features; Modular concepts; Articulated or collapsible guns (F41A0003640000, F41A0019100000-F41A0019150000, F41A0021480000, F41A0025260000 take precedence)
Modular concepts, e.g. weapon-family concepts

title.ko: 연결식 또는 접철식 총포, 즉 이송 또는 저장을 위하여 힌지결합되거나 신축가능한 것(분해산탄총 또는 라이플 F41C 7/11, 접을 수 있거나 신축가능한 개머리판 또는 개머리판부품 F41C 23/04)
title.en: Articulated or collapsible guns, i.e. with hinged or telescopic parts for transport or storage (breakdown shotguns or rifles F41C0007110000;folding or telescopic stocks or stock parts F41C0023040000)
Telescopic guns

title.ko: 냉각 또는 가열 시스템 총포신의 블로윙(blowing) 환기시스템
title.en: Cooling or heating systems (barrels or gun tubes with fins or ribs F41A0021000000); Blowing-through of gun barrels; Ventilating systems
Heating systems

title.ko: 총신 또는 약실에 유체를 주입하는 것
title.en: Injecting fluids into barrels or cartridge chambers (F41A0013080000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 총신에서 연소가스를 배출시키는 것
title.en: Evacuating combustion gas from barrels (F41A0013100000 takes precedence)
Bore evacuators, i.e. chambers disposed around barrels for storing part of the combustion gas and subsequently injecting it into the barrel to provide suction
Blowers or turbines for evacuating or cooling guns, e.g. driven by combustion gas pressure or recoil

title.ko: 총신의 외부면을 냉각시키기 위한 시스템(F41A 13/10, F41A 21/24가 우선)
title.en: Systems for cooling the outer surface of the barrel (F41A0013100000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 카트리지 익스트랙터(extractors) 즉, 약실로부터 적어도 부분적으로 카트리지 또는 카트리지 케이스를 뽑아내기 위한 장치; 카트리지 이젝터 즉, 뽑혀진 카트리지 또는 탄피를 총포 외부로 던져내기 위한 장치(F41A 9/54이 우선)
title.en: Cartridge extractors, i.e. devices for pulling cartridges or cartridge cases at least partially out of the cartridge chamber; Cartridge ejectors, i.e. devices for throwing the extracted cartridges or cartridge cases free of the gun (F41A0009540000 takes precedence)
for revolver-type guns, e.g. revolvers
specially adapted for cartridge cases being deformed when fired, e.g. of plastics
for breakdown guns
for block-action guns
of sliding-block type
for bolt-action guns
the ejector being mounted on, or within, the bolt
the ejector being mounted on the breech housing or frame
for guns with forwardly slidable barrels
specially adapted for caseless-ammunition duds
Tools for extracting cartridges

title.ko: 결합폐쇄식 안전기 (F41A 17/02가 우선)

title.ko: 전기 또는 전기기계적 안전장치(F41A 17/04, F41A 17/08이 우선)
title.en: Electric or electromechanical safeties (F41A0017040000, F41A0017080000 take precedence)

title.ko: 특정방향에의 발사를 금지시키기 위한 것, 예. 특정인물 또는 보호지역(F41A 27/02가 우선)
title.en: for inhibiting firing in a specified direction, e.g. at a friendly person or at a protected area (F41A0027020000 takes precedence)
Firing mechanisms with elevation stop
Firing mechanisms with anti-canting safety
Double-loading prevention
Cook-off prevention, i.e. prevention of spontaneous firing of a cartridge by chamber wall heat
Hang-fire prevention

title.ko: 총 파지(把持) 또는 개머리판 안전장치, 즉 총 파지 또는 개머리판을 꽉 쥐는 것에 의하여 분리되는 안전장치(엄지손가락으로 작동되는 미끄럼운동 안전장치 F41A 17/52, F41A 17/62, F41A 17/70, F41A 17/80)

acting on the trigger
acting on the firing pin
acting on the hammer
acting on the sear

the other element being the breech-block or bolt
Magazine safeties
locking the gun in a safety condition when the magazine is empty or removed
locking the magazine in the gun

title.ko: 최종탄 안전장치(F41A 17/34가 우선)
title.en: Last-round safeties (F41A0017340000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 브리취 블록 또는 노리쇠를 안전위치로 잠그기 위한 안전장치(F41A 17/32, F41A 17/36, F41A 17/40이 우선)
title.en: Safeties for locking the breech-block or bolt in a safety position (F41A0017320000, F41A0017360000, F41A0017400000 take precedence)
Safety plugs, e.g. for plugging-up cartridge chambers

title.ko: 방아쇠 안전장치, 즉 격발이동을 방지하기 위한 수단 (F41A 17/02에서 F41A 17/40이 우선)
title.en: Trigger safeties, i.e. means for preventing trigger movement (F41A0017020000-F41A0017400000 take precedence)

by breakdown action

title.ko: 시어(sear)안전장치, 예. 방아쇠 운동을 공이, 공이치기, 노리쇠 또는 시어에 전달하는 중간레버를 무력화시키는 수단(F41A 17/02에서 F41A 17/40이 우선)

by breakdown action

title.ko: 공이 안전장치, 즉 미끄럼운동 할 수 있게 장착된 공이(striker)의 운동을 방지하기 위한 수단(F41A 17/02에서 F41A 17/40이 우선)
